title: CyberSkill Feature Request Template — feature_request@1
description: Schema for the feature request template's YAML frontmatter. Encodes audit §1.4 #4: when eu_ai_act_risk_class is limited or high, the body must contain a ## AI Risk Assessment H2 with Data Sources, Human Oversight, Failure Modes subsections (validator body check). The unacceptable risk class is a hard schema reject — features in that bucket must not be filed.

eu_ai_act_risk_class.description: EU AI Act Articles 5-7. unacceptable is intentionally absent — features in that class must not be filed.

client_visible.description: Drives whether the Sales/CS bilingual summary is required.
